headline: Microsoft Releases Fara1.5: A Family of Browser Computer-Use Agents (4B/9B/27B) That Outperform OpenAI
subject: 🚨 AI Alert: 1 new launch — MarkTechPost AI
article_title: Microsoft Releases Fara1.5: A Family of Browser Computer-Use Agents (4B/9B/27B) That Outperform OpenAI Operator and Gemini 2.5 Computer Use on Online-Mind2Web

article_items.title: Microsoft Releases Fara1.5: A Family of Browser Computer-Use Agents (4B/9B/27B) That Outperform OpenAI Operator and Gemini 2.5 Computer Use on Online-Mind2Web
article_items.description: Microsoft Research released Fara1.5, an open family of browser computer-use agents (4B, 9B, 27B) scoring 72% on Online-Mind2Web.
article_items.excerpt: Microsoft Research released Fara1.5, an open family of browser computer-use agents (4B, 9B, 27B) scoring 72% on Online-Mind2Web.

The practical impact: Critical points and safety Fara1.5 is trained to stop and ask the user in three situations. The sandboxed browser also acts as a security boundary between the agent and the user’s machine. Watch next: GPT-5.4 scores 79.6% process and 57.4% outcome on the same benchmark. Microsoft Research released Fara1.5, a family of browser computer-use agents in 4B, 9B, and 27B sizes built on Qwen3.5.

The release ships three sizes: Fara1.5-4B, Fara1.5-9B, and Fara1.5-27B.
Microsoft Research released Fara1.5, a family of browser computer-use agents in 4B, 9B, and 27B sizes built on Qwen3.5.
One Model, Three Modalities: ByteDance Releases Lance for Image and Video Understanding, Generation, and...

Microsoft Releases Fara1.5: A Family of Browser Computer-Use Agents (4B/9B/27B) That Outperform OpenAI Operator and Gemini 2.5 Computer Use on Online-Mind2Web Microsoft Research’s AI Frontiers lab released Fara1.5.
Architecture and agent loop The models use Qwen3.5 base checkpoints in their 4B, 9B, and 27B variants.
On WebVoyager, Fara1.5-27B scores 88.6%, the 9B reaches 86.6%, and the 4B hits 80.8%.
FaraGen1.5: the synthetic data pipeline FaraGen1.5 is the synthetic pipeline that produced the training trajectories.
Microsoft Research released Fara1.5, an open family of browser computer-use agents (4B, 9B, 27B) scoring 72% on Online-Mind2Web.
GPT-5.4 scores 79.6% process and 57.4% outcome on the same benchmark.

rag_rules: Lead with the actual product, model, or API name.
Explain what changed before explaining why it matters.
Anchor credibility with dates, model names, pricing, availability, benchmarks, regions, or partners when the source provides them.
Separate proven capability from claimed capability.
